prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、水利类等工科专业社会热度持续较高；四川省2026年高考报名总人数约53.5万人，较2025年（约46.3万）增加约15.6%，考生规模显著扩大，整 体竞争加剧；河海大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对西南地区考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在四川省招生规模较大（物 理类161人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次21058、2026年扩招8.8%（推高位次数字）、四川省考生总数大幅增加约15.6%（进一步加剧竞争）以 及学校声誉平稳等因素，扩招与考生增幅部分对冲，预计2026年位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约21500名，区间21000–22000名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 20900 → 17125 → 32470 → 21058. In 2024, there was an abnormal significant drop (32470), but in 2025 it clearly stabilized to 21058, with large fluctuations in the past two years but returning to around the 2022 level in 2025. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in Sichuan Province was 133 in 2022, 144 in 2023, 146 in 2024, and 148 in 2025, showing a trend of gradual small expansion. The 2026 plan is 161, an increase of 13 (+8.8%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. It ranks 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, maintaining stable school level and comprehensive strength. Reputation evaluations have been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 52nd), with some attention on short video platforms but no explosive growth signal. No record of admission gaps. Water Resources Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, Environmental Science and Engineering is A. Water-related majors are the university's flagship, strongly attracting engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Water Resources continue to have high social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 463,000), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with some regional appeal to candidates from the southwest. The university has a large enrollment scale in Sichuan Province (161 in physics category), making it a key source province outside the region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 21058, the 2026 expansion of 8.8% (pushing the ranking number higher), the significant increase of about 15.6% in the total number of candidates in Sichuan Province (further intensifying competition), and the stable school reputation, the expansion and candidate increase partially offset each other. It is predicted that the 2026 ranking will slightly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 21500, with a range of 21000–22000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 21000–22000, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than 21000, you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 Dayu Intensive Class/Direct Track Class and popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to 22000, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Hohai University's water-related majors are top in the country, and candidates interested in the water resources industry should pay special attention.

学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, maintaining stable university level and comprehensive strength; recent reputation evaluations are stable, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', but attention to liberal arts-related majors is average; Hohai University's A-class disciplines (Water Conservancy Engineering A+, Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A) are all engineering, with no A-class discipline support for liberal arts majors, making the overall strength of liberal arts relatively average.

专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Accounting is stable; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025, with history category accounting for about 38.5%, estimating about 206,000 history category candidates, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025 (178,000), intensifying competition; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with some regional appeal to candidates from the southwest; the liberal arts enrollment scale is small (14), leading to relatively concentrated competition.

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3924, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 12.5% (pushing the ranking number downward), and the increase in Sichuan history category candidates by about 15.7% (intensifying competition), the reduction and candidate increase partially offset each other, predicting a slight upward shift in ranking compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3700, with a range of 3200–4200.
